_doc.purpose: Localization companion for COM_daily.json. Holds en-us entries for the topic-based talk interaction variants. Tense/style matched to the already-translated non-topic siblings (com_interaction_talk_begin_1/2/3, displayName_2) in the same file.

en-us.com_interaction_talk_begin_1_topic: $doer.firstname$ started chatting with $receiver.firstname$ about $topic$ without much focus
